title: Right to Maintenance by Children
summary: Senior citizens have the legal right to be supported by their children.

plainExplanation.whatItMeans: Children must provide financial support to elderly parents.
plainExplanation.whyItMatters: Ensures dignity and financial security for seniors.

acts.name: Maintenance and Welfare of Parents and Senior Citizens Act

exampleScenario.situation: Children refuse to provide basic support to elderly parents.
